summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Xentora Solutions AI CRM platform. Backend APIs 100% functional with all integrations working (MongoDB, Resend email, OpenAI GPT-5.2 chatbot). Frontend mostly functional with minor issues in testimonials section and chat widget overlay interference.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat widget button not clickable due to Emergent badge overlay interference
ui_bugs.workaround: force=True click bypasses but chat window doesn't open properly

design_issues.issue: Testimonials section missing from landing page
design_issues.notes: Found headings show pricing exists but testimonials content not found

issues: React hydration warnings in dashboard table structure

passed_tests: API health check and all 8 backend endpoints
Lead creation and email notifications via Resend
Lead management CRUD operations with status updates
Analytics dashboard with charts and statistics
Contact form submission with success toast
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Add missing Testimonials section to landing page 2. Fix chat widget overlay issue - consider repositioning or z-index adjustment 3. Fix React hydration warnings in AdminDashboard table structure
